target: 100% MySQL 8.0 grammar coverage with recursive descent parser

batches.name: infrastructure
batches.description: Parser struct, advance/peek/match/expect/pos helpers, Lexer, Token types, keyword map

batches.name: names
batches.description: Identifiers, qualified names (db.table.col), backtick-quoted identifiers, variable refs (@user, @@system)

batches.name: types
batches.description: Data types: INT, VARCHAR(N), DECIMAL(M,D), ENUM, SET, JSON, BLOB, DATE/TIME types, UNSIGNED, ZEROFILL

batches.name: expressions
batches.description: Operators, precedence (Pratt parsing), CASE, BETWEEN, IN, LIKE, REGEXP, IS, functions, CAST, CONVERT, INTERVAL

batches.name: select
batches.description: SELECT with all clauses including MySQL-specific: SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS, INTO, HIGH_PRIORITY, STRAIGHT_JOIN, UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT

batches.name: insert
batches.description: INSERT, REPLACE, ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE

batches.name: update_delete
batches.description: UPDATE (single and multi-table), DELETE (single and multi-table)

batches.name: create_table
batches.description: CREATE TABLE, column defs, constraints, table options, partitions, LIKE, CREATE TABLE AS SELECT

batches.name: alter_table
batches.description: ALTER TABLE with all MySQL-specific operations: ADD/DROP/MODIFY/CHANGE COLUMN, ADD/DROP INDEX, RENAME, etc.

batches.name: create_index
batches.description: CREATE INDEX, including UNIQUE, FULLTEXT, SPATIAL index types

batches.name: create_view
batches.description: CREATE VIEW, ALTER VIEW, CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW

batches.name: create_database
batches.description: CREATE/ALTER/DROP DATABASE, CREATE/ALTER/DROP SCHEMA

batches.name: drop
batches.description: DROP TABLE/INDEX/VIEW/DATABASE, TRUNCATE TABLE, RENAME TABLE

batches.name: set_show
batches.description: SET, SHOW, USE, DESCRIBE/EXPLAIN statements

batches.name: transaction
batches.description: BEGIN, START TRANSACTION, COMMIT, ROLLBACK, SAVEPOINT, LOCK/UNLOCK TABLES

batches.name: grant
batches.description: GRANT, REVOKE, CREATE/DROP/ALTER USER

batches.name: create_function
batches.description: CREATE FUNCTION/PROCEDURE, stored routines

batches.name: trigger
batches.description: CREATE TRIGGER, CREATE EVENT

batches.name: load_data
batches.description: LOAD DATA INFILE, LOAD XML

batches.name: prepare
batches.description: PREPARE, EXECUTE, DEALLOCATE PREPARE

batches.name: utility
batches.description: ANALYZE TABLE, OPTIMIZE TABLE, CHECK TABLE, REPAIR TABLE, FLUSH, RESET, KILL, DO

batches.name: stmt_dispatch
batches.description: Top-level statement dispatch, semicolon-separated list, wire up Parse() entry point

batches.name: cte_with
batches.description: Common Table Expressions (WITH ... AS). WITH clause for SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE. Includes RECURSIVE CTEs.

batches.name: window_over
batches.description: Complete OVER clause for window functions. Currently has TODO in parseFuncCall. Implement named/inline window specs, frame clauses (ROWS/RANGE/GROUPS BETWEEN).

batches.name: json_operators
batches.description: JSON column-path operators: -> (JSON_EXTRACT), ->> (JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT)), MEMBER OF, JSON_TABLE

batches.name: xa_transactions
batches.description: XA distributed transaction statements: XA START/BEGIN, XA END/SUSPEND, XA PREPARE, XA COMMIT, XA ROLLBACK, XA RECOVER

batches.name: set_transaction
batches.description: SET TRANSACTION isolation level and access mode. SET [GLOBAL | SESSION] TRANSACTION { ISOLATION LEVEL level | READ WRITE | READ ONLY }

batches.name: call_handler
batches.description: CALL procedure statement. HANDLER table OPEN/READ/CLOSE statements for direct row access.

batches.name: signal_diagnostics
batches.description: SIGNAL, RESIGNAL, and GET DIAGNOSTICS statements for stored program error handling

batches.name: compound_stmt
batches.description: Stored program compound statements: BEGIN...END blocks, DECLARE (variables, conditions, handlers, cursors), labels

batches.name: flow_control
batches.description: Stored program flow control: IF/ELSEIF/ELSE, CASE statement, WHILE, REPEAT, LOOP, LEAVE, ITERATE, RETURN, OPEN/FETCH/CLOSE cursor

batches.name: role_management
batches.description: CREATE ROLE, DROP ROLE, SET DEFAULT ROLE, SET ROLE, GRANT role TO user, REVOKE role FROM user

batches.name: show_extended
batches.description: Extended SHOW variants: SHOW ENGINES, SHOW PLUGINS, SHOW MASTER STATUS, SHOW SLAVE/REPLICA STATUS, SHOW BINARY LOGS, SHOW BINLOG EVENTS, SHOW TABLE STATUS, SHOW TRIGGERS, SHOW EVENTS, SHOW PROCEDURE/FUNCTION STATUS, SHOW CREATE PROCEDURE/FUNCTION/TRIGGER/EVENT, SHOW OPEN TABLES, SHOW PRIVILEGES, SHOW PROFILES, SHOW RELAYLOG EVENTS, SHOW CHARACTER SET, SHOW COLLATION

batches.name: table_values_stmt
batches.description: MySQL 8.0 TABLE statement (TABLE t is equivalent to SELECT * FROM t) and VALUES statement (VALUES ROW(1,2), ROW(3,4))

batches.name: checksum_shutdown
batches.description: CHECKSUM TABLE, SHUTDOWN, RESTART statements

batches.name: plugin_component
batches.description: INSTALL PLUGIN, UNINSTALL PLUGIN, INSTALL COMPONENT, UNINSTALL COMPONENT

batches.name: clone
batches.description: CLONE LOCAL/REMOTE instance statement (MySQL 8.0.17+)

batches.name: create_tablespace
batches.description: CREATE/ALTER/DROP TABLESPACE, CREATE/ALTER/DROP LOGFILE GROUP, CREATE/ALTER/DROP SERVER

batches.name: create_srs_resource
batches.description: CREATE/DROP SPATIAL REFERENCE SYSTEM, CREATE/ALTER/DROP RESOURCE GROUP

batches.name: alter_misc
batches.description: ALTER dispatches for VIEW, EVENT, FUNCTION, PROCEDURE. Also proper DROP FUNCTION/PROCEDURE/TRIGGER/EVENT with AST nodes (replace current RawStmt stubs).

batches.name: explain_extended
batches.description: EXPLAIN for all DML (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, REPLACE), EXPLAIN ANALYZE, EXPLAIN FORMAT=TREE/JSON for all statements, EXPLAIN FOR CONNECTION

batches.name: grouping_lateral
batches.description: GROUP BY WITH ROLLUP, GROUP BY grouping_sets (MySQL 8.0.25+: GROUPING SETS, CUBE, ROLLUP), LATERAL derived tables

batches.name: stmt_dispatch_phase2
batches.description: Wire all Phase 2 statement parsers into parseStmt and parseCreateDispatch/parseAlterDispatch/parseDropDispatch. Add missing keyword constants to lexer.

batches.name: replication_source
batches.description: New: CHANGE REPLICATION SOURCE TO with all source options, CHANGE REPLICATION FILTER with filter types

batches.name: replication_control
batches.description: New: START/STOP REPLICA, RESET REPLICA, PURGE BINARY LOGS, RESET MASTER

batches.name: group_replication
batches.description: New: START GROUP_REPLICATION with USER/PASSWORD/DEFAULT_AUTH, STOP GROUP_REPLICATION

batches.name: instance_admin
batches.description: New: ALTER INSTANCE (ROTATE keys, ENABLE/DISABLE REDO_LOG, RELOAD TLS/KEYRING), LOCK/UNLOCK INSTANCE FOR BACKUP, IMPORT TABLE

batches.name: cache_binlog
batches.description: New: BINLOG 'str', CACHE INDEX tbl IN cache_name, LOAD INDEX INTO CACHE tbl, RESET PERSIST [var]

batches.name: account_misc
batches.description: New: RENAME USER old TO new, SET RESOURCE GROUP name [FOR thread_id], HELP 'topic'

batches.name: depth_fix_outfuncs_vcpu
batches.description: Fix batch 38 gap: VCPUSpec struct missing writeNode case in outfuncs.go

batches.name: stmt_dispatch_phase3
batches.description: Wire Phase 3 parsers into parseStmt: replication, instance admin, cache/binlog, account misc, HELP, IMPORT

batches.name: show_remaining
batches.description: New: SHOW CREATE USER, SHOW REPLICAS/SLAVE HOSTS, SHOW ENGINE (singular, e.g. SHOW ENGINE INNODB STATUS/MUTEX), SHOW PROFILE (singular with type/query options), SHOW FUNCTION CODE, SHOW PROCEDURE CODE

batches.name: depth_fix_view_with_check_option
batches.description: Fix batch 10/39 gap: WITH CHECK OPTION after SELECT in CREATE/ALTER VIEW conflicts with WITH keyword parsing. Test at compare_test.go:6653 is disabled.

batches.name: change_master_to
batches.description: New: CHANGE MASTER TO (legacy alias for CHANGE REPLICATION SOURCE TO) - add MASTER keyword dispatch in parseChangeDispatch

batches.name: set_password
batches.description: New: SET PASSWORD [FOR user] = 'auth_string' - standalone password change with optional FOR user@host clause

batches.name: depth_fix_grant_as
batches.description: Fix batch 15 gap: GRANT ... AS user [WITH ROLE {DEFAULT | NONE | ALL | ALL EXCEPT role | role, ...}] clause for MySQL 8.0+ role context

batches.name: show_grants_index_processlist
batches.description: Fix batch 13/32 gap: SHOW GRANTS, SHOW INDEX, SHOW PROCESSLIST are implemented but not tracked in any batch and lack test coverage. Add SHOW FULL PROCESSLIST support.

batches.name: alter_table_partition_ops
batches.description: Fix batch 8 gap: ALTER TABLE partition operations - ADD/DROP/COALESCE/REORGANIZE/EXCHANGE/TRUNCATE/ANALYZE/CHECK/OPTIMIZE/REBUILD/REPAIR PARTITION

batches.name: alter_table_visibility_misc
batches.description: Fix batch 8 gap: ALTER TABLE column/index VISIBLE/INVISIBLE, FORCE, ORDER BY, ENABLE/DISABLE KEYS, DISCARD/IMPORT TABLESPACE, WITH/WITHOUT VALIDATION

batches.name: create_table_depth
batches.description: Fix batch 7 gap: column VISIBLE/INVISIBLE modifier, CHECK constraint NOT ENFORCED clause, functional/expression-based index keys, SUBPARTITION support

batches.name: grant_tls_resources
batches.description: Fix batch 15 gap: GRANT/REVOKE REQUIRE clause (SSL, X509, SUBJECT, ISSUER, CIPHER) and resource limits (MAX_QUERIES_PER_HOUR, MAX_UPDATES_PER_HOUR, MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_HOUR, MAX_USER_CONNECTIONS)

batches.name: alter_user_extended
batches.description: Fix batch 15 gap: ALTER USER PASSWORD EXPIRE, ACCOUNT LOCK/UNLOCK, FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS, PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME, COMMENT, ATTRIBUTE, resource limits, TLS requirements

batches.name: depth_fix_select_distinctrow
batches.description: Fix batch 4 gap: add DISTINCTROW keyword as alias for DISTINCT in SELECT option parsing

batches.name: depth_fix_load_data_lines_starting_by
batches.description: Fix batch 18 gap: LOAD DATA LINES STARTING BY clause parses value but discards it. Add LinesStartingBy field to LoadDataStmt AST node and store parsed value. Update outfuncs.go to emit the field.

batches.name: create_loadable_function
batches.description: New: CREATE [AGGREGATE] FUNCTION loadable UDF syntax (RETURNS type SONAME 'lib') - distinct from stored function syntax, requires IsAggregate flag and Soname AST field

batches.name: depth_fix_select_into_outfile
batches.description: Fix batch 4 gap: INTO OUTFILE missing export options (FIELDS/COLUMNS TERMINATED BY, ENCLOSED BY, ESCAPED BY, LINES TERMINATED BY, CHARACTER SET), INTO positioning (before FROM, before FOR UPDATE), LOCK IN SHARE MODE legacy syntax, SELECT modifiers SQL_SMALL_RESULT/SQL_BIG_RESULT/SQL_BUFFER_RESULT/SQL_NO_CACHE

batches.name: depth_fix_select_partition_with_insert
batches.description: Fix batch 4/22 gap: PARTITION clause on table references (SELECT ... FROM t PARTITION (p0, p1)), WITH ... INSERT support, set operation INTERSECT precedence over UNION/EXCEPT

batches.name: depth_fix_create_table_constraints_ctas
batches.description: Fix batch 7 gap: index_option parsing on table-level constraints (USING, KEY_BLOCK_SIZE, COMMENT, VISIBLE/INVISIBLE), IGNORE/REPLACE before SELECT in CTAS, bare SELECT (no AS) in CTAS, store LINEAR flag on partitions, store MATCH type on foreign keys

batches.name: depth_fix_alter_table_default_constraint
batches.description: Fix batch 8 gap: ALTER COLUMN SET DEFAULT must consume the default value expression (currently skipped causing parse errors), ADD (multi-column) parenthesized form, ALTER CHECK/CONSTRAINT ENFORCED, DROP CONSTRAINT keyword

batches.name: depth_fix_grant_proxy_privileges
batches.description: Fix batch 15 gap: GRANT/REVOKE PROXY ON user, column-level privileges priv_type (column_list), multi-word privilege names (CREATE VIEW, ALTER ROUTINE, etc.), REVOKE ALL PRIVILEGES GRANT OPTION FROM user, IDENTIFIED WITH ... AS 'hash', ALTER USER IF EXISTS, ALTER USER DEFAULT ROLE

batches.name: depth_fix_set_persist_show_full
batches.description: Fix batch 13/32 gap: SET PERSIST and SET PERSIST_ONLY scopes, SHOW FULL TABLES, SHOW SCHEMAS/FIELDS synonyms, SHOW EXTENDED COLUMNS/FULL COLUMNS, SET CHARACTER SET error handling, EXPLAIN FOR CONNECTION

batches.name: depth_fix_analyze_histogram_flush
batches.description: Fix batch 20 gap: ANALYZE TABLE UPDATE HISTOGRAM ON col WITH N BUCKETS, ANALYZE TABLE DROP HISTOGRAM ON col, FLUSH TABLES WITH READ LOCK, FLUSH TABLES FOR EXPORT, FLUSH BINARY LOGS structured parsing, ALTER TABLESPACE SET ACTIVE/INACTIVE

batches.name: depth_fix_expr_group_concat
batches.description: Fix batch 3 gap: GROUP_CONCAT ORDER BY panics on non-column-ref expressions (unsafe type assertion to *nodes.ColumnRef). Should handle arbitrary expressions in ORDER BY clause.

batches.name: depth_fix_insert_update_delete_partition
batches.description: Fix batch 5/6 gap: INSERT/REPLACE PARTITION clause, INSERT AS row_alias (MySQL 8.0.19+), DELETE PARTITION clause, DELETE table alias, WITH CTE before UPDATE/DELETE dispatch

batches.name: depth_fix_replication_misc
batches.description: Fix batch 43/44/47 gap: PURGE BINARY LOGS BEFORE datetime expression parsing, START REPLICA UNTIL GTID set string parsing, CACHE INDEX with PARTITION and index list clauses

batches.name: depth_fix_expr_sounds_like_row_default_values
batches.description: Fix batch 3 gap: SOUNDS LIKE string comparison operator (add kwSOUNDS to lexer, parse as binary op), ROW() constructor expression for row comparisons (ROW(1,2) = ROW(a,b)), DEFAULT(col_name) function form (currently only parses bare DEFAULT keyword), VALUES(col_name) function for INSERT ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE context

batches.name: depth_fix_match_query_expansion
batches.description: Fix batch 3 gap: MATCH ... AGAINST WITH QUERY EXPANSION modifier - currently only parses IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE and IN BOOLEAN MODE, missing standalone WITH QUERY EXPANSION and combined IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE WITH QUERY EXPANSION

batches.name: depth_fix_natural_join_semantics
batches.description: Fix batch 4 gap: NATURAL LEFT [OUTER] JOIN and NATURAL RIGHT [OUTER] JOIN lose the NATURAL modifier - currently returns JoinLeft/JoinRight instead of preserving NATURAL semantics. Add JoinNaturalLeft and JoinNaturalRight to JoinType enum, update matchJoinType and outfuncs.go

batches.name: depth_fix_select_into_position2
batches.description: Fix batch 4 gap: INTO clause position 2 (between HAVING and ORDER BY) is not implemented - MySQL allows INTO at 3 positions: after select_expr (pos 1), after HAVING before ORDER BY (pos 2), after FOR UPDATE (pos 3). Only positions 1 and 3 are currently supported.

batches.name: depth_fix_create_user_password_random
batches.description: Fix batch 15 gap: IDENTIFIED BY RANDOM PASSWORD syntax (MySQL 8.0.18+), RETAIN CURRENT PASSWORD dual-password support (MySQL 8.0.14+), DISCARD OLD PASSWORD. Add PasswordRandom and RetainCurrentPassword fields to UserSpec and AlterUserStmt AST nodes.

batches.name: depth_fix_table_options_secondary_engine
batches.description: Fix batch 7 gap: missing table options - PASSWORD [=] 'string' (listed in MySQL docs but not parsed), SECONDARY_ENGINE [=] engine_name (MySQL 8.0.13+), SECONDARY_ENGINE_ATTRIBUTE [=] 'string' (MySQL 8.0.21+). Add cases to parseTableOption and corresponding AST fields.

batches.name: depth_fix_column_format_storage
batches.description: Fix batch 7 gap: COLUMN_FORMAT {FIXED|DYNAMIC|DEFAULT} column modifier and STORAGE {DISK|MEMORY|DEFAULT} column modifier are not parsed. MySQL 8.0 allows these in column definitions but the parser only handles STORAGE as a table option. Add COLUMN_FORMAT and STORAGE to parseColumnOption, isColumnConstraintStart, and corresponding AST ColumnDef fields.

batches.name: depth_fix_utility_tests_batch1
batches.description: Fix batch 20 gap: add dedicated tests for table maintenance and administrative statements in utility.go - ANALYZE TABLE, OPTIMIZE TABLE, CHECK TABLE, REPAIR TABLE, FLUSH, RESET, KILL, DO, CHECKSUM TABLE, SHUTDOWN, RESTART

batches.name: depth_fix_utility_tests_batch2
batches.description: Fix batch 27/35/36/37/38/46 gap: add dedicated tests for CALL, HANDLER OPEN/READ/CLOSE, INSTALL/UNINSTALL PLUGIN/COMPONENT, CREATE/ALTER/DROP TABLESPACE, CREATE/ALTER/DROP SERVER, CREATE/DROP SPATIAL REFERENCE SYSTEM, CREATE/ALTER/DROP RESOURCE GROUP, ALTER INSTANCE, LOCK/UNLOCK INSTANCE, IMPORT TABLE, RESET PERSIST

batches.name: index_hints
batches.description: New: Parse USE INDEX, FORCE INDEX, IGNORE INDEX hints on table references. AST IndexHint struct exists (parsenodes.go) with Type/Scope/Indexes fields but no parser code. Must handle USE/FORCE/IGNORE {INDEX|KEY} [FOR {JOIN|ORDER BY|GROUP BY}] (index_list) after table name in FROM clause.

batches.name: depth_fix_show_event_value_capture
batches.description: Fix batch 32 gap: SHOW BINLOG EVENTS and SHOW RELAYLOG EVENTS skip FROM position and LIMIT offset,count values with bare p.advance() instead of parsing expressions. SHOW WARNINGS/ERRORS LIMIT count also skipped. Store these values in ShowStmt AST fields.

batches.name: depth_fix_show_create_user_host
batches.description: Fix batch 51 gap: SHOW CREATE USER parses username via parseTableRef then discards @host with bare p.advance(). Should use parseUserSpec (from grant.go) to properly capture user@host as a UserSpec.

batches.name: depth_fix_partition_algorithm_value
batches.description: Fix batch 7 gap: PARTITION BY KEY and SUBPARTITION BY KEY consume ALGORITHM={1|2} value with p.advance() but do not store it in PartitionClause AST. Add Algorithm field and capture the integer value at lines 1016-1019 and 1147-1152.

batches.name: depth_fix_show_profile_limit_offset
batches.description: Fix batch 51 gap: SHOW PROFILE LIMIT count [OFFSET offset] values are consumed with bare p.advance() instead of parsing expressions. Should use p.parseExpr() and store values in ShowStmt.LimitCount and ShowStmt.LimitOffset fields (already defined in AST from batch 85).

batches.name: depth_fix_table_option_autoextend_engine_attr
batches.description: Fix batch 7 gap: missing AUTOEXTEND_SIZE [=] value table option (MySQL 8.0.23+) and ENGINE_ATTRIBUTE [=] 'string' table option (MySQL 8.0.21+) in parseTableOption identifier-based options. SECONDARY_ENGINE_ATTRIBUTE is handled but ENGINE_ATTRIBUTE is not.

batches.name: depth_fix_column_engine_attribute
batches.description: Fix batch 7 gap: missing column-level ENGINE_ATTRIBUTE [=] 'string' and SECONDARY_ENGINE_ATTRIBUTE [=] 'string' modifiers in column definitions (MySQL 8.0.21+). Not parsed in parseColumnOption or isColumnConstraintStart.

batches.name: depth_fix_index_engine_attribute
batches.description: Fix batch 9 gap: missing ENGINE_ATTRIBUTE [=] 'string' and SECONDARY_ENGINE_ATTRIBUTE [=] 'string' index options in parseIndexOption (MySQL 8.0.21+). These attributes apply to CREATE INDEX and table-level index/constraint definitions.

batches.name: depth_fix_alter_table_secondary_load_unload
batches.description: Fix batch 8 gap: missing ALTER TABLE ... SECONDARY_LOAD and ALTER TABLE ... SECONDARY_UNLOAD actions (MySQL 8.0.13+) for loading/unloading tables in HeatWave secondary engine. Need new AlterTableCmd types and lexer keywords.

batches.name: depth_fix_subpartition_algorithm_value
batches.description: Fix batch 87 gap: SUBPARTITION BY LINEAR KEY ALGORITHM={1|2} value was not stored in part.SubPartAlgo. Also fixed token type checks: LINEAR was checked as tokIDENT instead of kwLINEAR, and ALGORITHM was checked as tokIDENT instead of kwALGORITHM.

batches.name: depth_fix_repair_usefrm_checksum_extended
batches.description: Added UseFrm field to RepairTableStmt and Extended field to ChecksumTableStmt. Parser now stores these values. Added outfuncs serialization for both.

batches.name: depth_fix_logfile_group_stubs
batches.description: Fix batch 37 gap: CREATE/ALTER/DROP LOGFILE GROUP use RawStmt token-skipping stubs in stmt.go instead of proper parse functions. Need AST nodes (CreateLogfileGroupStmt, AlterLogfileGroupStmt, DropLogfileGroupStmt), parse functions in utility.go, outfuncs cases, and dispatch wiring in stmt.go.

batches.name: depth_fix_show_create_schema_if_not_exists
batches.description: Fix batch 13/32 gap: SHOW CREATE SCHEMA synonym not handled (only kwDATABASE checked in SHOW CREATE dispatch), and SHOW CREATE {DATABASE|SCHEMA} IF NOT EXISTS clause not parsed. Add SCHEMA case and optional IF NOT EXISTS parsing.

batches.name: review_infrastructure_shared
batches.description: BNF review: Review lexer, parser helpers, expression parser, shared clause helpers (character set, collation, storage engine options, partition definitions). Establish baseline for all subsequent reviews.

batches.name: review_select
batches.description: BNF review: Full review of SELECT against 46-line BNF. CTE/WITH, subquery, JOIN, PARTITION, GROUP BY WITH ROLLUP, HAVING, ORDER BY, LIMIT/OFFSET, FOR UPDATE/SHARE, INTO, DISTINCT/ALL, index hints, LATERAL.

batches.name: review_dml
batches.description: BNF review: Review all DML against BNF. INSERT ON DUPLICATE KEY, REPLACE, multi-table UPDATE/DELETE, PARTITION clause, LOW_PRIORITY/DELAYED/HIGH_PRIORITY, IGNORE.

batches.name: review_create_table
batches.description: BNF review: Full review against 165-line BNF. Column definitions, constraints, table options (ENGINE, CHARSET, COLLATE, ROW_FORMAT, COMPRESSION, etc.), partitioning (RANGE/LIST/HASH/KEY/LINEAR), LIKE, AS SELECT, temporary tables.

batches.name: review_alter_table
batches.description: BNF review: Full review against 121-line BNF. ADD/MODIFY/CHANGE/DROP COLUMN, ADD/DROP INDEX/KEY, RENAME, CONVERT CHARACTER SET, PARTITION operations (ADD/DROP/TRUNCATE/REORGANIZE/COALESCE/EXCHANGE/ANALYZE/CHECK/OPTIMIZE/REBUILD/REPAIR/REMOVE), ALGORITHM, LOCK, FORCE, ORDER BY, ENABLE/DISABLE KEYS, SECONDARY_LOAD/UNLOAD.

batches.name: review_index_view_trigger
batches.description: BNF review: CREATE/DROP INDEX, CREATE/ALTER/DROP VIEW, CREATE/DROP TRIGGER against 87 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_routines_events
batches.description: BNF review: CREATE/ALTER/DROP PROCEDURE, CREATE/ALTER/DROP FUNCTION, CALL, CREATE/ALTER/DROP EVENT against 145 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_compound_flow
batches.description: BNF review: BEGIN...END, DECLARE, IF/ELSEIF/ELSE, CASE, LOOP/WHILE/REPEAT, LEAVE/ITERATE, RETURN, OPEN/FETCH/CLOSE cursor, SIGNAL/RESIGNAL/GET DIAGNOSTICS against ~80 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_security
batches.description: BNF review: CREATE/ALTER/DROP USER, CREATE/DROP ROLE, GRANT, REVOKE, SET DEFAULT ROLE, SET ROLE, SET PASSWORD, RENAME USER against 283 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_database_tablespace_admin
batches.description: BNF review: CREATE/ALTER/DROP DATABASE, USE, CREATE/ALTER/DROP TABLESPACE, CREATE/ALTER/DROP SERVER, CREATE/ALTER/DROP LOGFILE GROUP, RENAME TABLE, TRUNCATE TABLE against 97 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_transaction_xa_locking
batches.description: BNF review: BEGIN/START TRANSACTION, COMMIT, ROLLBACK, SAVEPOINT/RELEASE, SET TRANSACTION, XA START/END/PREPARE/COMMIT/ROLLBACK/RECOVER, LOCK TABLES/UNLOCK TABLES, LOCK INSTANCE FOR BACKUP against 84 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_show
batches.description: BNF review: All 37+ SHOW variants against 207 lines of BNF across 37 files. SHOW DATABASES, TABLES, COLUMNS, CREATE TABLE/VIEW/etc., INDEX, GRANTS, PROCESSLIST, STATUS/VARIABLES, ERRORS/WARNINGS, ENGINES, PLUGINS, PROFILES, BINARY LOGS, BINLOG/RELAYLOG EVENTS, REPLICA STATUS, MASTER STATUS, OPEN TABLES, TABLE STATUS, TRIGGERS, EVENTS, FUNCTION/PROCEDURE STATUS/CODE, REPLICAS, PRIVILEGES, CHARACTER SET, COLLATION, ENGINE.

batches.name: review_set_explain
batches.description: BNF review: SET variable, SET CHARACTER SET, SET NAMES, SET RESOURCE GROUP, EXPLAIN/DESCRIBE/HELP against 67 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_load_import
batches.description: BNF review: LOAD DATA, LOAD XML, LOAD INDEX INTO CACHE, TABLE statement, VALUES statement against 86 lines of BNF. Added LOW_PRIORITY/CONCURRENT, PARTITION, CHARACTER SET, OPTIONALLY ENCLOSED BY, IsXML flag, ROWS IDENTIFIED BY for LOAD XML. Restructured LOAD INDEX INTO CACHE to store partitions/indexes/ignore_leaves per table. Added INTO clause to TABLE statement.

batches.name: review_maintenance_utility
batches.description: BNF review: ANALYZE TABLE, CHECK TABLE, CHECKSUM TABLE, OPTIMIZE TABLE, REPAIR TABLE, FLUSH, CACHE INDEX, KILL, SHUTDOWN, BINLOG, DO against 109 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_plugin_clone_instance
batches.description: BNF review: INSTALL/UNINSTALL PLUGIN, INSTALL/UNINSTALL COMPONENT, CLONE, RESTART, ALTER INSTANCE against 52 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_replication
batches.description: BNF review: CHANGE REPLICATION SOURCE, START/STOP REPLICA, RESET, RESET PERSIST, CHANGE MASTER TO, START/STOP GROUP REPLICATION against 14+ lines of BNF plus replication docs.

batches.name: review_spatial_resource_group
batches.description: BNF review: CREATE/DROP SPATIAL REFERENCE SYSTEM, CREATE/ALTER/DROP RESOURCE GROUP, SET RESOURCE GROUP against 54 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_prepare_drop
batches.description: BNF review: PREPARE, EXECUTE, DEALLOCATE PREPARE, all DROP statements against ~50 lines of BNF.

batches.name: review_expression_deep
batches.description: BNF review: Full expression parser review. Operator precedence, CASE, BETWEEN, IN, LIKE, IS, CAST/CONVERT, JSON operators (-> ->>), MATCH AGAINST, GROUP_CONCAT, window functions (OVER), subquery expressions, ROW constructor, DEFAULT/VALUES, MEMBER OF, SOUNDS LIKE. Cross-cutting across all BNF files.

batches.name: depth_fix_definer_propagation
batches.description: Fix batch 16/17/10/39 gap: DEFINER clause consumed at dispatch layer (stmt.go parseCreateDispatch/parseAlterDispatch) but never propagated to sub-parsers. Affects CREATE FUNCTION, CREATE PROCEDURE, CREATE TRIGGER, CREATE EVENT, CREATE VIEW (via DEFINER path), ALTER VIEW, ALTER EVENT. AST nodes have Definer field but it is never populated when DEFINER appears before the object keyword.

batches.name: depth_fix_alter_user_registration_factor
batches.description: Fix batch 61 gap: ALTER USER missing BNF branches from alter-user.bnf lines 11-18 and 40-64. Missing: (1) USER() user_func_auth_option syntax, (2) registration_option (factor INITIATE/FINISH REGISTRATION, factor UNREGISTER), (3) ADD/MODIFY/DROP factor factor_auth_option operations, (4) factor_auth_option as distinct from standard auth_option.

batches.name: depth_fix_insert_values_row_constructor
batches.description: Fix batch 5 gap: INSERT ... VALUES ROW(val, val), ROW(val, val) row constructor syntax not supported. BNF insert.bnf lines 19-36 specify VALUES row_constructor_list form where row_constructor_list is ROW(value_list)[, ROW(value_list)]. parseValuesRows() at insert.go:234 expects '(' immediately after VALUES but ROW keyword precedes it. Standalone VALUES statement (select.go:1620) correctly requires ROW syntax but INSERT does not.

batches.name: depth_fix_outfuncs_expr_loc
batches.description: Fix batch 3 gap: BinaryExpr, UnaryExpr, and IsExpr write functions in outfuncs.go do not serialize the :loc field, unlike every other expression type (BetweenExpr, InExpr, LikeExpr, CaseExpr, CastExpr, ParenExpr, etc.). Add fmt.Fprintf(sb, " :loc %d", n.Loc.Start) to writeBinaryExpr, writeUnaryExpr, and writeIsExpr for consistency.

batches.name: depth_fix_table_option_keywords
batches.description: Fix batch 7 gap: parseTableOption() checks for CHECKSUM, TABLESPACE, ENCRYPTION, UNION in the tokIDENT fallback branch, but the lexer registers these as keyword tokens (kwCHECKSUM, kwTABLESPACE, kwENCRYPTION, kwUNION) so they never enter that branch. Add explicit case entries in the switch statement. UNION also needs parenthesized list parsing instead of consumeOptionValue.

batches.name: depth_fix_table_option_data_index_directory
batches.description: Fix batch 7 gap: DATA DIRECTORY and INDEX DIRECTORY table options are two-token sequences (DATA is kwDATA, INDEX is kwINDEX) but parseTableOption() checks for 'data_directory' and 'index_directory' as single tokIDENT strings, which never matches. Add case kwDATA: and case kwINDEX: that peek for DIRECTORY next token and parse [=] 'path'.
